_note: Manual overrides for GA legislative race candidates, applied after build_legislative_races.py generates from source data. Keys are candidate IDs (e.g. 'ga-house-1-2026-r-1'). Use _name for human-readability only — it is stripped before merging. Fields here override the auto-generated values. Incumbents get imageUrl auto-populated from ga-members.json; use this file to correct bad source data or add fields for challengers.

ga-house-113-2026-d-1.Bio: As your State Representative, I will be a progressive voice in the Georgia State House and a present, accountable partner here at home. I will work to lower the cost of living, expand access to quality and affordable healthcare, strengthen our public schools, and hold powerful corporations accountable when they put profits over people. You will see me at the grocery store, the park, church, neighborhood meetings, and local cookouts; listening, learning, and serving. Representation does not stop in Atlanta; it begins and ends in the community. In the spirit of my father's legacy, and guided by the values he passed down to me, I am proud to announce my candidacy for the Georgia House of Representatives in District 113.
